hypothesis: A material overnight gap followed by a completed first-session-bar response contains a causal intraday fade or continuation signal that is not covered by the existing multi-bar gap-impulse screen.

execution_contract.gap: Current session opening price minus the prior completed session close, normalized by ATR known at that prior close.
execution_contract.signal: The first current-session M15 bar must close in the direction required by fade or continuation mode by at least response_atr times prior ATR.
execution_contract.entry: Next M15 bar open after the first bar has completed.

selection_contract.preholdout_gate: DEV trades>=150 PF>=1.15 net>0; validation trades>=25 PF>=1.05 net>0; at least four positive development years
selection_contract.selection: One global family winner by the lower of development and validation PF.
selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Only a preholdout survivor may be recomputed through 2025.
selection_contract.holdout_gate: trades>=50 PF>=1.10 net>0 and both 2024 and 2025 positive

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
